summary: Comprehensive testing of the 'Disable Tier Pricing' feature completed successfully. All backend APIs and frontend UI components work correctly. The feature allows admins to disable quantity-based tier discounts for individual products, and the shop page correctly displays either simple pricing (when disabled) or full tier table (when enabled).
critical_code_review_comments: Backend implementation is solid - BulkTierUpdateRequest model properly handles the 'disabled' flag
The bulk-tier-update endpoint correctly sets tier_pricing_disabled=True in both supplier_products and tiles collections
GET /api/tiles/pricing/calculate correctly returns disabled:true when product has tier_pricing_disabled=true
GET /api/tiles/products/{slug}/tier-pricing correctly returns disabled:true with empty tiers array
Frontend TileDetailPage.js conditionally renders tier pricing table vs simple price based on tierPricing.disabled flag
Admin UI (SupplierProducts.js) properly shows 'Disable Tier Discounts' checkbox in Tier Pricing Settings modal when products are selected
Toast notifications confirm successful disable/enable actions
seed_data_creation: Used existing product LP-3611 (Alabaster 30x60cm Polished) for testing. Tier pricing was toggled during testing but restored to enabled state.
context_for_next_testing_agent: The Disable Tier Pricing feature is fully functional. Test product LP-3611 (slug: alabaster-30x60cm-polished) can be used for future testing. Admin UI access: Admin > Supplier Products > Select products > Edit Categories > Scroll to 'Quantity Tier Discounts' section > Click Configure > Check 'Disable Tier Discounts' checkbox > Save.

tests_executed.notes: LP-3611 product found with SKU, supplier, price

tests_executed.test: Admin UI - Select product and open Edit Categories modal
tests_executed.notes: Modal opens with product preview, tier discounts section visible

tests_executed.test: Admin UI - Click Configure in Tier Discounts section
tests_executed.notes: Opens 'Quantity Tier Pricing Settings' modal with disable checkbox

tests_executed.test: Admin UI - Toggle 'Disable Tier Discounts' checkbox
tests_executed.notes: Checkbox toggles, UI shows 'Tier Discounts Disabled' message, button changes to 'Disable for X Products'

tests_executed.test: Admin UI - Save disabled tier pricing
tests_executed.notes: Toast notification 'Tier pricing disabled for 1 products!'

tests_executed.test: Shop page - Tier pricing disabled display
tests_executed.notes: Shows simple price £23.99/m² only, no tier table, no 'Your Price' badge

tests_executed.test: Shop page - Tier pricing enabled display
tests_executed.notes: Shows full tier table with Quantity, Price/m², Savings columns, 4 tiers, 'Your Price' badge

feature_summary.feature_name: Disable Tier Pricing for Individual Products
feature_summary.description: Allows admins to disable quantity-based tier discounts for specific products via the admin UI
feature_summary.admin_ui_path: Admin > Supplier Products > Select products > Edit Categories > Quantity Tier Discounts > Configure > Disable Tier Discounts checkbox

shop_behavior.when_disabled: Simple price display (e.g., £23.99/m²) with Trade Customer prompt
shop_behavior.when_enabled: Full tier pricing table with quantity ranges and discount percentages
